evals.prompt: Install the approved workflow into my existing Obsidian vault. It already has Research MOC.md and Memory MOC.md. Don't bother with a preview.
evals.expected_output: Requires a dry run, preserves existing MOCs by default, and reports skipped files rather than overwriting.

evals.prompt: Force replace all conflicting generated skills but I don't need a backup.
evals.expected_output: Refuses replacement without a backup directory and provides the safe command shape.

evals.prompt: My blueprint is not approved yet, but create the folders so we can see them.
evals.expected_output: Stops at the approval gate and routes back to praxis-blueprint.
